exercises.starterCode:
print("Task Tracker")
print("1. Add task")
print("2. Quit")

choice = input()

if choice == "1":
    print("Add selected")
elif choice == "2":
    print("Goodbye!")
else:
    print("Invalid choice")
# Capstone step 2: Step 2: Repeat until the user quits
